signals.pattern: When proposing self-improvement changes ([FILE] rules, hooks, skills), explain the full proposal and get confirmation before implementing. But once the user approves a plan, execute it normally ...
When CI auto-formats code and runs typecheck remotely, drop those from local pre-push checks. Only keep fast, high-signal checks locally (lint for real bugs, fast tests for regressions).

Have all automation scripts committed and merged before cloning to a remote instance. Relaying commands through a chat interface causes copy-paste failures (heredoc indentation, quoting, line wrapp...

Validate the full pipeline (including serialization and file [REPO]) with synthetic data before starting long-running experiments. A bug in the serialization path crashed a 3-hour run at the final step.
